text:
Invincible VS - The Immortal Gameplay Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/invincible-vs/

In Invincible VS, Immortal can finally get the revenge he always wanted.

The Immortal joins the Invincible VS roster when Season 1 drops on June 30th.

The Immortal is included in the Year 1 Character pass. Try him for yourself in Training Mode before purchase. 

Invincible VS is out now on PS5.

The Immortal is the 20th Fighter announced for Invincible VS. 

Play as The Immortal along with the rest of the 18 fighter roster in Invincible VS PS5.

From ‪@Skybound‬ and in-house studio Quarter Up. Buy now on PS5.

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Deer & Boy - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
Some adventures stay with you forever, and Deer & Boy is one of them. Available NOW on PS5💫 Play here: https://store.playstation.com/concept/10013737 

🦌 Guide a boy and his deer through a hand-crafted world
🫂 Follow a story about the bond between them
🧠 Solve challenges integrated into your journey
 
🦌 What is DEER & BOY about?
Deer & Boy is a narrative cinematic adventure that tells a silent story through stunning visuals and evocative music. In this poetic cinematic platformer, a runaway boy meets a fawn. As their bond grows, so do their abilities and the emotional weight of their journey, where silence speaks louder than words.
 
Deer & Boy is developed by Lifeline Games and published by Dear Villagers.

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Frostpunk 2 - Breach of Trust Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10008442/

"No fire, no frost, shall drive us apart."

But trust? That fractures easily. As New Edinburgh burns and Aurora watches from across the frozen lake, negotiations become your only weapon. Will you unite the scattered remnants of humanity, or will you bend them to your will?

Breach of Trust, new scenario expansion for Frostpunk 2, launches June 23rd on PS5.

#ps5 #ps5games #frostpunk2

Check out this new extended gameplay video of Denshattack!'s first boss fight, Yoshie of the Dashing Queens! 

In Denshattack!, flip, trick and grind your train on a fast-paced, off-the-rails ride through a colourful Japanese dystopia. Outmatch rival gangs, wreck a shady megacorp, and take back the tracks with nothing but skill, speed, and style.

📅 Launching 15th July 2026 on PlayStation 5. Wishlist now!

NTE - Ver.1.1 "Meet the New S-Class Chaos!" Character Trailer | PS5 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/nte-neverness-to-everness/

NTE Ver.1.1 "Forsaken Path" Limited Board Coming Soon
ETD-6's resident "masked weirdo"... or so people think. Really he's a sunny, easygoing guy who just genuinely believes masks are cool. On the job, his unstoppable drive comes with zero regard for the rulebook. Good thing his resourceful captain is there to clean up after him.
